question.label: Questioning pattern
question.name: What keeps you from asking more questions earlier?
question.description: Surfaces the barrier behind the low-question pattern without assuming the cause.

answer: I need explicit expectations for the next cycle so I can calibrate fast.

assessment.note: Names missing explicit expectations as the barrier to calibrating early — a mild clarity and engagement deficit rather than a wellbeing issue.

new_queue.label: Earlier signals
new_queue.name: What would help you spot expectation drift earlier next time?

issues: coverage: injected wellbeing into next question (0 touches after turn 8)

history.answer_excerpt: I think I am shipping, but I am not sure I am aiming at the highest-leverage work yet.

I probably should ask for sharper feedback earlier than I do.
